markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's potential support for RAMP's new YouTube channel, Cashflow Desk, through a separate domain and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to provide end-to-end management for a new domain supporting RAMP's Cashflow Desk YouTube channel](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Goal: Create an "owned third-party channel" to appear as affiliate content, not directly associated with RAMP](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [New domain challenges: Need strategies to build authority quickly (e.g., cross-linking, backlinking)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Project structure: Separate contract with milestones, allowing flexibility and proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Cashflow Desk YouTube Channel Overview

  - [\~1 month old YouTube channel by RAMP](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Producing \~3 videos per week](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Aim: Index faster by creating a separate domain with same topics as videos](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities and Examples

  - [Demonstrated high-quality content creation for tech companies (e.g., a.town, Augment Code)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Agentic workflows for research, fact-checking, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Experience with new domains (e.g., DataGrader, Tiro) and accelerating growth](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)

### New Domain Challenges and Strategies

  - [Building authority quickly is crucial for new domains](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
  - [Strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Cross-linking from ramp.com](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
      - [Backlinking (even if minimal)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)
      - [Targeting long-tail, low-volume keywords initially](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [Possible newsletter sponsorships for initial traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

### Project Structure and Expectations

  - [Separate contract for Cashflow Desk project](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Include milestones and specific outputs](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Manage expectations: May not see immediate results in first few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Gradual content scaling instead of bulk creation (e.g., avoid creating 1000 pages at once)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### Design and Content Quality

  - [GrowthX has strong design capabilities (e.g., former Grammarly head of design)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Confidence in creating high-quality, fast-loading site](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Content will leverage and embed existing Cashflow Desk videos](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to prepare and present a detailed proposal for the Cashflow Desk project](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [RAMP to review performance report shared by GrowthX; follow up with any questions](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [GrowthX to structure a separate contract for the Cashflow Desk project with clear milestones](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [RAMP to consider internal steps to support the new domain (e.g., cross-linking strategy)](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Both parties to move quickly on project initiation once proposal is approved](https://fathom.video/share/ceFsDmo4PAiJdHCJXTDzLzDyumFjrNVW?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
